feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Date . . contains invalid character ,infotype 2 is incorrect in slg1 .
entry.content:
While Integrating  the employee data from SF to S4Hana , for only few employee the errors are popping  in the SLG1 transaction, stating that the the " Date .. contains invalid character and info type 2 is incorrect . Kindly help on the above.

 

Thanks & Regards .

entry.title: Hide Overtime Hours from Employee Time Sheets
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Employees should not be able to see any extra hours they have worked beyond the standard 8 hours on their timesheets. For instance, if an employee works more than 8 hours in a day, the additional hours should not be visible on their timesheet.

Please let us know the feasibility of the standard working hours are displayed to employees.

Thank you!

entry.title: In Job information, visibility of Reporting managers field should be based on plant/mines/office
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The requirement here is to ensure that HR personnel can only view relevant employee details, restriction on event reasons based on the Plant, Mines, or Office.

For example: When an HR representative is attempting to change the Reporting Manager (RM) for employees at a specific Plant, the system should be configured to prevent the display of employees from other Plants, Mines, or Offices in the search field. This restriction would ensure that HR personnel can only access and modify information pertinent to the specific location they are working with. 

Thankyou.

entry.title: Restricting Employee Visibility in Reporting Matrix: Limit Access to Hierarchical Levels Above HOD
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The requirement is regarding visibility in the reporting matrix org chart. Employees should only be able to view positions up to two levels above their own within the reporting hierarchy, specifically not beyond the Head of Department (HOD).

  • Employees should have visibility into their direct reporting lines and up to two levels higher in Org chart.
  • Access to positions above the HOD will be restricted to ensure a clear and focused view within the reporting structure.
  • For Example: If Rahul is an employee with Ayaskant as his reporting manager, and Ayaskant's reporting manager is Jayashree, Rahul will be able to view positions up to and including Jayashree in the organizational chart. He will not have access to view positions above Jayashree.

Thank you.

entry.title: Restricting Employee Visibility: Preventing Access to Reporting Manager's Peers
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The requirement is here to restrict access within organizational chart. Employees shall not be able to view positions that are at the same hierarchical level as their reporting manager.

For Example: If Rahul is an employee with Ayaskant as his reporting manager, Rahul will be able to view positions up to Ayaskant in the organizational chart. However, Rahul will not have access to view the positions of Ayaskant’s peers who are at the same level as Ayaskant.

Key Details:

  • Employees will have visibility into their direct reporting lines and up to their reporting manager.
  • Access to positions at the same level as the reporting manager will be restricted.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Trigger Workflow upon Deleting Resignation Details from Job Information
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope this message finds you well.

We are considering a new requirement where HR admins should have the ability to cancel an approved resignation before the employee's Last Working Day (LWD). As part of this process, we need a workflow to be triggered upon deleting resignation details from Job Information.

Current Scenario:

  • Resignation details are initiated and recorded in Job Information.
  • We need to ensure that when HR admins delete the resignation transaction, a workflow is triggered.

Challenge:

  • Currently, in SuccessFactors, there is no functionality to set up a workflow for actions performed while deleting a transaction from Job Information.

Example:

  • If a resignation is recorded for an employee and HR Admin decides to delete this resignation transaction, the workflow should be triggered to handle this action accordingly.

Could you please check the feasibility of implementing this workflow trigger or suggest alternative solutions?

Thank you.

entry.title: How to keep track of graduates in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We want to track our graduates in SuccessFactors. Who are they, how long do they work in our company, which positions do they get after being a graduate and so on. As far as I know, there aren't any standard solutions for this. 

Any recommendations? 

Br,

Ines

entry.title: Letter can only be generated in document generation only post Event Reasons approval
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope this message finds you well.

The requirement here is that Letter can only be generated post Event Reasons approval.

Key Point:

  • Letter Generation: Letters, such as promotion letters, can only be generated after the Event Reasons, such as promotions, have been triggered & approved by the designated approvers.

Example:

  • A Promotion Letter will only be generated once the promotion has received the necessary approvals from the approvers. Any attempt to generate the letter before this approval will not be processed.

Kindly let us know the feasibility.

Thank you.

entry.title: Business Driven Configuration Questionnaire
entry.content:
Hi,

  If any one has SuccessFactors implementation questionnaire or Business Driven Configuration Questionnaire, please share. If there is a link for the same, please help with it.

 

Thanks

Sri

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Business email creation in AD to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi AD and SF Experts,

I recently worked on a project aimed at generating business email addresses and usernames in Active Directory, with the intention of sending this information back to SuccessFactors.

However, we discovered that while generating usernames was possible, creating business email addresses was not. We could only update existing business email addresses from AD to SF. From what I’ve read, it seems that AD-SF integration does not support the creation of email addresses.

So, I’m curious—what do your customers typically do in this situation? It seems like automatically generating business email addresses is a common practice. HR shouldn’t have to manually enter this information during the hiring process.

Best regards,
Ines

entry.title: Different Configuration in QA and production system in Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Different Configuration found in QA and production system in Employee Central Instance, 

how to rectify or sync so that both systems have same configuration 

Thank you!

entry.title: Temporary Time Information for China new hires
entry.content:
Hi

Is anyone else using Temporary Time Information for China to deal with weekends becoming working days.

We use this feature but our HR team would like to know if there is a way of automating this for new hires as currently they create the temporary time information for each new hire in China.

Keen to know how others are handling this process.

Thanks!

Chris

entry.title: Need a Report with Names of all employees who selected Box #4 on the I-9 form
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a legal  requirement that needs a report that includes the names of all employees who selected Box #4 on the I-9 called Non-Citizen Authorized to work until [Date]. They also need this report to include the date input. They would like this data exported from both ONB1.0 and 2.0 .  Is this feasible ? I have gone through the ONB 2.0 Implementation guide 1H/2024 release , Section 8.20  but I couldn't find any Box # related fields. Please confirm. If not possible any workaround ?

I spoke with SAP Support team, but as per them it is not possible to have it in Story Report as on today.

Regards,

Niladri

 SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Sync Employee Central Termination Date to S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
We are currently replicating data from SuccessFactors Employee Central via an integration in SAP Integration Suite called "SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Employee Data".

Is there a way we can replicate the termination date or Company Exit date from Employee Central to S/4 HANA Cloud and apply it to the Business User's validity?

That way whenever an employee is terminated from SuccessFactors, once the sync runs it will update the business user's validity on S/4 Hana Cloud and it will get deactivated.

entry.title: Hello,how to create a field to disability and degree of disability in Global Info
entry.content:
Hello , for my client i have to create a field  to disability and degree of disability in Global Info,create this field in Core and ONB? what is the action i shoud take can anyone help me

Thank you

entry.title: rule to delete attachment
entry.content: It is possible to delete attachment after 1 month?

entry.title: How To hide the "Work Permit" portlet in both Employee Central (EC)for USA Employes
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can anybody  help me To find how to hide the "Work Permit" portlet in  Employee Central (EC) for USA employee only please

entry.title: Ensuring Auto-Submission of Timesheets Without Overtime Hours in Positive Time Recording
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm working with positive time recording where auto-approval is enabled by default. I want to modify this so that if an employee does not work overtime hours, their timesheet is automatically submitted. However, if overtime hours are recorded, the timesheet should require manager approval. I’ve identified a basic business rule that seems relevant, but I’m looking for advice on whether there are other methods or solutions available to address this issue. Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

 

 

 

Thank you!

entry.title: How to grant access for a specific period of time
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

in SuccessFactors RBP, we are looking for a solution to add the user to a specific Permission Group for a certain period of time like 24 hrs/2 days, after elapsing the time the user must be auto removed from that group.

Any suggestion would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module?
entry.content: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module? I couldn't find any clear functionality list matched with modules in use. Can somebody help?
